title: Trump Shares Video Claiming He Is Deliberately Crashing the Market to Force Fed Rate Cuts
detail: Trump shared a video on social media on April 4 claiming the ongoing stock market decline was intentional — a deliberate strategy to pressure the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates and enable cheaper refinancing of the national debt. Trump also publicly attacked Fed Chair Jerome Powell, calling him 'Too Late Powell.' Financial analysts called the framing 'spin,' noting that a deliberate market crash carries significant economic risks. The Dow had fallen roughly 9–10% since Liberation Day tariff escalation began.

title: DHS/ICE Publishes Enforcement Update; Total Departures Exceed 2.5 Million
detail: DHS published an enforcement update on April 4 highlighting ICE arrests of gang members, sex offenders, and stalkers as part of ongoing interior enforcement operations. Cumulative data showed the administration had surpassed 2.5 million total immigration departures since January 2025, including over 605,000 formal deportations and approximately 1.9 million self-departures. ICE detention population held at a record ~68,000. Critics noted that despite administration signals of targeted enforcement, a significant share of arrests continued to involve individuals with no criminal record.
